entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where crop area statistics are generated through a collaborative process involving various departments.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where land utilization and crop statistics are collected by Village Revenue Officers.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A state in India where the Directorate of Economics and Statistics is responsible for collecting land utilization and crop statistics.

entities.name: CROP AREA STATISTICS
entities.description: Data regarding the area of land used for growing specific crops.

entities.name: LAND USE
entities.description: Statistics regarding how land is utilized in Karnataka.

entities.name: CROPS IRRIGATED
entities.description: Statistics regarding the extent of irrigation for crops in Karnataka.

entities.name: LAND UTILIZATION
entities.description: Statistics regarding the use of land in Andhra Pradesh and Odisha.

entities.name: JOINT FIELD INSPECTION
entities.description: A collaborative data collection process in Karnataka involving Village Accountants, Agricultural Assistants, and Work Inspectors.

entities.name: VILLAGE-LEVEL SURVEYS
entities.description: Surveys conducted in Odisha by District Planning and Monitoring Units to collect agricultural data.

entities.name: EARAS
entities.description: Establishment of an Agency for Reporting Agricultural Statistics, a framework in Odisha defining village coverage for reporting.

entities.name: RANDOMIZED SAMPLING FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A sampling approach used within the EARAS framework in Odisha to cover all villages over five years.
